message:
feat(e2e): Add --scan-log mode for JSONL secret scanning

Extend fcp-e2e CLI with a new mode for scanning log files:

CLI additions:
- --scan-log <file>: Path to JSONL file to scan for secrets/PII
- --scan-report <report.json>: Path to write the scan report
- Both --output and --scan-report required when using --scan-log

Behavior:
- Reads JSONL file and runs scan_log_jsonl() for secret detection
- Creates E2eLogEntry with pass/fail based on error_count
- Writes JSONL log to --output path
- Writes detailed JSON report to --scan-report path
- Exits with code 1 if any error-severity findings

The scan report includes:
- total_lines scanned
- finding_count with details
- error_count and warn_count aggregates
- source file path

This enables CI integration for automated log hygiene checks before
log files are archived or transmitted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
